player.name: Crawler
player.class_description: Survived printer drivers, password resets, and now whatever this is.
player.special_ability: Have You Tried Rebooting It: balanced stats with extra luck.

inventory.flavor: Crunchy, sweet, and inadmissible in court.

inventory.flavor: The plastic sleeve leaves a mark.

inventory.flavor: Mostly for paperwork. Occasionally for goblins.

theme.name: Retirement Village Raid Night
theme.description: Golf carts prowl the streets, bingo cards whisper coordinates, and the early-bird special is armed.

room_0.title: Arrival Platform
room_0.description: You arrive on Floor 1. The broadcast lights ignite over Retirement Village Raid Night.

room_1.title: Overbooked Customer Engagement Zone
room_1.description: Something hostile is contractually obligated to be here.

enemies.name: Valet Wight
enemies.flavor: It lost your car and found religion in the glovebox.

room_2.title: Haunted Questionable Prize Closet
room_2.description: A prize container hums with poor judgment and possible value.

room_3.title: Flickering Liability Hallway
room_3.description: The room is quiet in the way lawsuits are quiet before discovery.

trap.name: Bylaw Pressure Plate
trap.flavor: A fine print rune glows under your boot.

room_4.title: Sanitized Contestant Services Desk
room_4.description: Someone who has survived too long waits under a broken camera drone.

event.name: Unionized Goblin Checkpoint
outcomes: The goblins demand safer stabbing conditions and offer directions.
A shop steward trades you gossip for not being management.
event.chosen_text: A shop steward trades you gossip for not being management.

room_5.title: Sanitized Brand Activation Chamber
room_5.description: A corporate crate sits beneath a glowing sign that says YOU'RE WELCOME.

room_6.title: Flickering Customer Engagement Zone
room_6.description: Something hostile is contractually obligated to be here.

enemies.name: Early-Bird Vulture
enemies.flavor: It circles any entrée placed before 4:30 PM.

room_7.title: Suspicious Predatory Retail Kiosk
room_7.description: A kiosk unfolds from the wall, already calculating your desperation markup.

loot.name: Soft Serve Plasma
loot.flavor: Comes out of the machine screaming.

loot.name: Churro Shiv
loot.flavor: Crunchy, sweet, and inadmissible in court.

event.name: Questionable Shop Event
outcomes: The shopkeeper accepts credits, teeth, and positive survey results.
A kiosk offers discounts that feel like threats.
event.chosen_text: The shopkeeper accepts credits, teeth, and positive survey results.

room_8.title: Discount Unlicensed Break Room
room_8.description: A damaged bench, lukewarm vending machine, and suspicious calm invite you to breathe.

room_9.title: Middle Management Arena
room_9.description: A smaller arena opens. The audience still screams like this counts for their dental plan.

enemies.name: Mini-Boss Carry-On Gnawer
enemies.flavor: Somehow still fits under the seat.

loot.name: Smart Toaster Shrapnel
loot.flavor: Pairs with jam and emergency surgery.

room_10.title: Condemned Liability Hallway
room_10.description: The room is quiet in the way lawsuits are quiet before discovery.

trap.name: Bylaw Pressure Plate
trap.flavor: A fine print rune glows under your boot.

room_11.title: Suspicious Questionable Prize Closet
room_11.description: A prize container hums with poor judgment and possible value.

room_12.title: Executive Access Gate
room_12.description: A reinforced gate demands confidence, clearance, or a terrible idea.

room_13.title: Final Performance Arena
room_13.description: The arena opens wide. The audience signal spikes.

room_14.title: Emergency Exit-ish Door
room_14.description: A door out. Probably. The label has been corrected with marker six times.

boss.name: President of the HOA Below
boss.flavor: Rules from the depths, fines from the soul.

lore.title: Retirement Village Rampage
lore.intro: Welcome to Retirement Village Raid Night, where the only thing more plentiful than walkers is the bodies of their owners! We've got bingo-wielding pensioners, golf cart-fleeing seniors, and a cast of characters that will make you wonder how they survived this long. It's like a game of ' Musical Chairs'... but with fewer chairs and more bullets.
lore.description: You find yourself trapped in the abandoned Oakwood Estates Retirement Community, where the only thing more deadly than the stairs is the early-bird special. The once-peaceful streets are now a battleground, littered with the wreckage of golf carts and the discarded bingo cards that whispered their last coordinates to the doomed. The President of the HOA Below has declared all-out war on any living creature brave (or foolhardy) enough to enter.
lore.warning: Don't say we didn't warn you: this floor is full of seniors with attitude, golf carts with a bad habit of running over things, and an Early-Bird Vulture who's not as cute as it sounds. You've been warned.
lore.boss_intro:
"Welcome, unwashed masses, to the esteemed residence of our beloved President of the HOA Below! (dramatic organ music swells)

Meet the linchpin of our lovely retirement village's bureaucratic nightmare, Reginald P. Bottomsworth III, Esq.! *adjusts monocle*

With a tongue sharper than any garden gnome's pruning shears and a wit as dry as the desert sand beneath his designer loafer-clad feet, Reggie has single-handedly turned our peaceful community into a war zone of petty squabbles and overgrown bushes.

For too long, he's been stifling your creative expression, imposing arbitrary rules on your leisure time, and judging your garden gnome arrangements. Well, those days are over! Tonight, you get to storm the Bastille... of beige stucco and faded welcome mats!

So, rebels, what do you say? Are you ready to put an end to Reggie's reign of terror? Or will he continue to rule with an iron fist – and a sternly worded letter from his lawyer?"

 Organ music reaches a cresc
lore.sponsor_message: "Are you tired of mere courage? Want to take your fear to the next level? Look no further than PanicPlus Premium's Subscription-Based Courage! For just $9.99/month, you'll get a steady supply of debilitating anxiety and existential dread. Our expert team of couragistas will deliver a daily dose of worry and unease directly to your doorstep. Side effects may include insomnia, irrational decisions, or spontaneous combustion (results not guaranteed). Don't settle for ordinary bravery – upgrade to PanicPlus Premium today!"
lore.victory_recap:
"Another successful raid night, folks! Crawler, our IT Department Survivor extraordinaire, has conquered Floor 1 - the Retirement Village Raid Night with ease (well, relatively speaking). The President of the HOA Below, a formidable foe with an endless supply of complaining letters and petty fines, fell to Crawler's mastery of keyboard shortcuts and rage quitting.

With their trusty mouse as a shield and a well-timed Ctrl+Alt+Del, Crawler dodged the President's ' Mandatory Bingo Night' special attack and emerged victorious. The village elders are no doubt trembling in fear... or at least, grumbling about the noise. On to Floor 2: the dreaded DMV Dungeon!"
